title: Personas (per-org)
description: Validates state/_orgs/<slug>/personas.yaml. Persona shape per v1 advisor/references/persona-library.md (id, label, lens, default_grounding_source_type, optional selection_heuristic). Schema is permissive to allow custom persona libraries and future extensions.

default_grounding_source_type.description: Per v1 persona-library.md § Grounding source types. Examples: actuarial-valuation-report, statute-or-regulation, market-survey, internal-pay-data, employee-feedback.

default_grounding_source.description: Free-text grounding source (alternate field name used in v1 bundled persona examples).
